calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-24-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Daniel M. Bornstein, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Mercy Housing California.
Saundra Randolf, assistant manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Twila Lee.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on May 6, 2010.

Exhibit--1--SFHA Section 8 Contract & Lease Agreement dated 11/17/09.................ID/EVID.
Exhibit--2--10 Day NOtice to Pay Rent or Quit........................................ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Mercy Housing California, and against defendant Twila Lee as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $500.00.
Holdover Damages - $195.84.
Costs - $300.00.

Total - $995.84.

Additionally, plaintiff Mercy Housing California is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 125 Sixth Street, No. 313, San Francisco, CA. The lease agreement is forfeited.

Counsel stipulated to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-24-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-20-2010 Off Calendar
